must_distinguish.note: 队员 = member of a team or squad (sports, military unit, specific crew); 成员 = member of any group or organization (broader, also used for families, committees, states).

cedict_en: to protect/to defend/to guard against/to prevent

must_distinguish.note: 防 = defend/prevent (ward off threats, proactive). 保护 = protect (general safeguarding). 守护 = guard/watch over (ongoing devoted protection). 爱护 = care for (out of affection, not threat-based). 掩护 = cover/shield (military or covert protection). 预防 = prevent (health/risk precaution before harm). 避免 = avoid (steer clear of sth undesirable).

cedict_en: to drop/to fall/to come down/to descend/to surrender; to capitulate/to subdue; to conquer; to tame

must_distinguish.note: 降 = descend/lower (root); 降低 = reduce a level or quantity (transitive: lower costs); 降落 = physically land (aircraft, object); 降临 = befall/descend upon (events, literary).

cedict_en: to cut the price/to drive down the price/to get cheaper

must_distinguish.note: 价格 (5k) = market price of a specific item; 物价 = commodity price level in general (macro); 代价 (5k) = figurative cost/sacrifice; 降价 = the action of cutting the price
院子 = an enclosed courtyard/yard (residential); 院 = courtyard morpheme, also suffix for institutions (医院, 法院); 花园 (5k) = a planted garden, not just a bare yard
院子 = an enclosed courtyard/yard (residential); 院 = courtyard morpheme, also suffix for institutions (医院, 法院); 花园 (5k) = a planted garden, not just a bare yard

cedict_en: the head of an institution whose name ends in 院[yuan4]; chair of a board; university president; college dean; premier of the Republic of China
dataset_meanings: the head of an institution whose name ends in 院
premier of the Republic of China

must_distinguish.note: 院长 = head of an institute/hospital/college (院); 校长 = head of a school or university (校); 主任 = head of a department or office
随后 = immediately following in sequence (right after); 不久 = an unspecified short time later (temporal gap, not necessarily immediate)

cedict_en: to separate/to partition/to stand or lie between/at a distance from/after or at an interval of
dataset_meanings: after or at an interval of

must_distinguish.note: 隔/隔开 = separate by physical barrier or interval; 分开 = split apart (general, reversible); 分离 = separate with a sense of parting (often people/components); 分散 = scatter/disperse into multiple parts
隔/隔开 = separate by physical barrier or interval; 分开 = split apart (general, reversible); 分离 = separate with a sense of parting (often people/components); 分散 = scatter/disperse into multiple parts
难题 = a specific hard problem (noun); 难度 = abstract difficulty level (measure); 困难 = general hardship/difficulty (noun or adj)
难题 = a specific hard problem (noun); 难度 = abstract difficulty level (measure); 困难 = general hardship/difficulty (noun or adj)
静 = quiet/still (literary adj, inner calm); 安静 = quiet without disturbance (environment/behavior, everyday); 寂静 = deep silence (literary, atmospheric)

cedict_en: to be close to/to approach; to draw near

must_distinguish.note: 靠近 = move physically close to (everyday); 接近 = approach / be close to (physical or abstract, neutral); 靠拢 = close up / draw together (military or group formation).
音乐会 covers any music concert (instrumental or vocal); 演唱会 is specifically a vocal/singing concert or pop/rock live show
预备 = get ready personally (simple preparation, also adj. preparatory); 筹备 = organize and arrange (events, projects — involves coordination)
颜色 = color (neutral everyday noun); 色 = color (root morpheme, used in compounds, also literary); 色彩 = color with tonal/figurative nuance (also: flavor, hue in art/rhetoric)
色 is a morpheme/literary noun; 颜色 is the everyday neutral noun for 'color'; 彩色 means 'multicolored/color' as an attribute (彩色电视); 色彩 (5k) is literary/figurative 'hue/flavor'
飞 = fly (everyday verb); 飞行 = fly/flight (formal technical, aviation context); 航行 = navigate/sail or fly (sea or air voyage); 航空 = aviation (noun/adj, industry term)

cedict_en: head/chief/first (occasion, thing etc)/classifier for poems, songs etc

must_distinguish.note: 首 = head/chief (literary, also classifier for songs/poems); 组长 = small team/group leader; 所长 = head of an institute or bureau; 领导 = everyday boss/leader (also verb: to lead); 领导人 = official leader (formal title); 领袖 = top political figure/chief (elevated, reverential)
头 is neutral 'head' (body part, also top/beginning); 脑袋 is colloquial/informal; 首 is a classifier for songs/poems or literary 'chief/head' — not the body part

cedict_en: driver's license (abbr. for 駕駛執照|驾驶执照[jia4 shi3 zhi2 zhao4])

must_distinguish.note: 驾照 = driver's license only; 执照 = any business/professional permit or license

cedict_en: to ride a bike (motorbike or bicycle)
dataset_meanings: to ride a bike (motorbike or bicycle)

must_distinguish.note: 骑车 = ride a bicycle/motorbike (straddle-type); 乘车 = travel by car/vehicle (passenger); 乘/乘坐 = ride/travel by (formal; 乘 also means multiply); 搭 = hitch a ride or take public transport (colloquial)
欺骗 = to deceive (general verb); 骗子 = a swindler/cheat (person noun); 作弊 = to cheat specifically in an exam, game, or competition (situational).
超 is a prefix/verb meaning 'exceed a threshold' or 'super-'; 超过 is a verb 'to exceed, surpass' (quantity or performance); 高于 means 'higher than' and is specifically comparative for levels/values
高大 = tall and large/imposing (physical size, of people or structures); 挺拔 = tall and erect/straight (elegant upright bearing, literary — trees, figures).

cedict_en: short name for Heilongjiang 黑龍江|黑龙江[Hei1 long2 jiang1]/black/dark/sinister/secret/shady/illegal/to hide (sth) away/to vilify/(loanword) to hack (computing)
dataset_meanings: abbr. for Heilongjiang province 黑龙江

must_distinguish.note: 黑色 = black as a color noun (colour category); 黑 = black/dark as predicate adjective; 乌黑 = jet-black (lustrous, used of hair/eyes)
黑暗 is a noun/strong adj (physical or moral darkness); 暗 is a general adj (dim, also covert/secret)
黑色 = black as a color noun (colour category); 黑 = black/dark as predicate adjective; 乌黑 = jet-black (lustrous, used of hair/eyes)
鼠 = literary/formal form, appears in compounds (鼠疫, 鼠标); 老鼠 = everyday colloquial word for mouse/rat
